title: AssertJ assertions with Consumer arguments should contain assertion inside consumers
description: Ensures that when using AssertJ assertion methods that accept Consumer arguments (such as allSatisfy, anySatisfy, noneSatisfy, satisfies, etc.), the Consumer contains at least one assertion. This prevents false positives in tests where the Consumer does not actually assert anything.
recommendation: Always include at least one assertion inside the Consumer argument when using AssertJ assertion methods that accept Consumer arguments.
impact: Tests may pass without actually verifying any conditions, leading to undetected bugs.

checks.message: Consumer argument to AssertJ assertion method does not contain an assertion.
